name: tts-dialogue
description: Generates character dialogue audio using ElevenLabs eleven_v3 model via ComfyUI Cloud partner nodes.

dynamic_params.1.voice: Voice selection. Available: Roger (male, american), Sarah (female, american), Laura (female, american), Charlie (male, australian), George (male, british), Callum (male, american), River (neutral, american), Harry (male, american), Liam (male, american), Alice (female, british), Matilda (female, american), Will (male, american), Jessica (female, american), Eric (male, american), Bella (female, american), Chris (male, american), Brian (male, american), Daniel (male, british), Lily (female, british), Adam (male, american), Bill (male, american)
dynamic_params.2.stability: 0.0-1.0 — lower = broader emotional range, higher = more consistent
dynamic_params.2.model.similarity_boost: 0.0-1.0 — higher = more similar to original voice
dynamic_params.2.seed: Change for variation, keep same for reproducibility

expected_outputs.audio: MP3 audio file of the spoken dialogue

notes.model_options: eleven_v3 (newer, requires speed + similarity_boost) or eleven_multilingual_v2 (older, requires speed + similarity_boost + use_speaker_boost + style)
notes.voice_format: Must use full label e.g. 'George (male, british)' not just 'George'
notes.dynamic_combo_syntax: Model sub-inputs use dot notation: model.speed, model.similarity_boost
